decision.title: Pure DOM rendering with event-driven updates (no canvas/kaplay)
decision.rationale: Event-driven DOM rendering satisfies R-v5.21 naturally. No per-tick redraws. Vite+TS+iconify for icons. CSS for all styling. Simpler than canvas for UI-heavy game.

decision.title: 8-phase roadmap: UI-first vertical slice priority
decision.rationale: Title→Map→Combat gives playable vertical slice by phase 3. Forge/inventory/NPCs layer on top. Build+persist last.

decision.title: Auto-resolve combat (UO style) with action policy configuration
decision.rationale: R-v5.13 mandates auto-resolve. Player configures loadout+policies before encounter, combat plays out with visible log, pause to adjust.

decision.title: Iconify game-icons for all visual assets
decision.rationale: @iconify-json/game-icons provides 4000+ game-themed SVG icons. Lightweight, npm-installable, consistent visual style. Satisfies G3 asset sourcing preference order.

decision.title: Dark fantasy color theme with CSS custom properties
decision.rationale: Consistent dark panel backgrounds, gold accents, color-coded elements. Professional UI feel for G3.

decision.title: Combat auto-plays at 1.2s intervals with PAUSE button
decision.rationale: Gives player time to read the log and pause to adjust. Policies evaluated in priority order each turn.

decision.title: 12 spell recipes covering all rune combinations + spell-as-ingredient
decision.rationale: All 5 runes create 10 pairwise combinations + 2 spell+rune combos. Satisfies G2 (3+ valid combinations) with margin.

decision.title: Affinity increases from casting, not menu training
decision.rationale: R-v5.01 explicitly requires affinity gain through casting. Training dummies provide safe casting environment.

decision.title: Floor 1 enemies resist raw physical → need fire/crafted spells; Floor 2 enemies reflect direct → need status/indirect
decision.rationale: Each floor introduces a mechanical constraint requiring adaptation per requirements. Forces forge use for G2 ingenuity gate.

decision.title: Four pressure systems: resource (limited mana/stamina/rest), counterplay (resistances/immunities), encounter (bosses requiring crafted spells), build (loadout limits)
decision.rationale: Satisfies G4 requirement for 2+ pressure mechanics, provides 4 for margin.
